positive: A whimsical and stylized abstract forest scene, featuring silhouetted figures of animals (deer, fox, owl) interacting with bioluminescent flora and meandering river curves. The style should be modern botanical illustration meeting Art Nouveau poster art, utilizing deep sapphire blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and creamy ivory backgrounds. Emphasis on clean lines, high contrast, and decorative elements that repeat well across fabric. The central composition should draw the eye through the forest depth, with glowing magical elements providing strong visual pops. Isolated elements should have crisp edges and minimal background clutter for excellent print quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, grain, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, low detail, messy, amateur, logo, trademark, writing, disfigured
